title: Deep learning for global flood forecasting
abstract: We present a novel deep learning approach for global flood forecasting that achieves state-of-the-art performance across 5,680 river basins worldwide.

sections.introduction: Flood forecasting is critical for early warning systems...
sections.methods: We use an LSTM ensemble model trained on ERA5-Land reanalysis data...
sections.results: Our model achieves a reliability score of 0.85 across all basins...
sections.discussion: The results demonstrate the potential of AI for operational flood forecasting...

claims.statement: The model achieves 0.85 reliability score across all basins
